hero.bio: I design and build production-grade web applications with a focus on performance, interaction quality, and scalable architecture. Available for freelance and full-time roles.

about.heading: About
about.intro: I'm a Computer Science student and Full Stack Developer who thrives on conceptualizing and creating unique ideas. I have a growing passion for front-end design and story-driven landing pages, and I am constantly learning how to craft more immersive digital experiences.

blocks.title: How I Build
blocks.body: My core focus lies in full-stack development, bridging the gap between web and mobile applications. Whether I'm structuring a responsive frontend or designing a scalable backend architecture, my goal is to build pragmatic, real-world solutions.

blocks.title: Creative Philosophy
blocks.body: I believe that development is just as much about narrative as it is about code. I spend a lot of time thinking about how to weave unique stories into landing pages and user interfaces, experimenting with design to create memorable interactions.

blocks.title: Always Learning
blocks.body: While I'm still in school, my curiosity doesn't stop at standard coursework. I'm actively exploring machine learning and deep learning, constantly experimenting and finding new, practical ways to apply AI-driven features into my applications.

about.location: Tagum City, Philippines · Open to Remote

experience.desc: Built a fullstack 3-tier system for Catsy Coffee and a multi-vendor marketplace (Baylora). In Machine Learning, developed a KNN Banana Leaf Disease detector, gathered real-world samples, and advanced it using CNNs. Engineered an NLP topic and language modeling tool for Tagalog, English, and Bisaya. Pitched 'GanapPH', an AI-powered job recommendation platform.

Deepened knowledge in Java (OOP, Data Structures & Algorithms). Expanded to fullstack web development with PHP and MySQL, focusing on database normalization, SQL queries, application dataflow, and data visualization using charts.

Mastered the core building blocks of the web: HTML semantics, the DOM, and CSS presentation. Learned how to structure web layouts and apply global styling using classes and IDs to create responsive interfaces.

Began programming during the COVID-19 pandemic by writing Lua scripts for games in Roblox. Transitioned to the Godot Engine to build 2D RPGs, sparking a lifelong passion for software engineering and problem-solving.

contact.heading: Open to Opportunities
contact.subtext: Available for freelance projects, contract work, and full-time positions. If you have a role or project in mind, I'd like to hear about it.

education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science

testimonials.quote: Working with Domince on multiple AI projects and GanapPH was incredible. He took conceptual ideas and built top-tier, fully working prototypes.
testimonials.author: KYNDEL ROY SUAREZ
testimonials.role: Partner & Collaborator (Catsy, NLP, Banana Leaf & GanapPH)

testimonials.quote: Domince was our anchor during Catsy Coffee and NLP development. His backend problem-solving saved us days of debugging.
testimonials.author: ANGELO JABONITE

testimonials.quote: Doms is extremely detail-oriented. His dedication to clean code structure and thorough API documentation made team iteration effortless.
testimonials.author: NINA NILLAS

testimonials.quote: He took charge of training the KNN model and wrapping it inside a smooth React app, making our ML project highly interactive.
testimonials.author: JOVAN REGUYA

testimonials.quote: He has a brilliant approach to fullstack development, always keeping clean logic and system performance in mind. My go-to friend for tech stacks.
testimonials.author: JAYVIEN MOCALLAY

testimonials.quote: Doms's eye for UI design is next-level. His obsession with 60fps animations and micro-interactions makes every site feel incredibly premium.
testimonials.author: RYAN DENIEGA

testimonials.quote: His portfolio speaks for itself. He deeply understands both smooth user experiences and clean backend engineering.
